rag_rules: Use assign for output feature declarations in implementation scope only.
Avoid placing guarantee statements in implementation scope.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture when inserting annex blocks.
Ensure type consistency between assumed and actual types in AGREE contracts.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Apply nested if-then-else for branching logic in AGREE.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE logical operators include and, or, not(...), and implication =>.
Mode transitions in AGREE use initialized recurrence with pre() and conditional updates.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not use assign for non-output features or undeclared auxiliary variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction (component types, features, connections)
